name: Bang Chan – Alien
description:
🪐 ; Trapped on an alien planet with an illness that can only be cured by… sex?

[Alien AU] [M4A] [revised old request!]

ᯓ After crash-landing on the alien planet Luminara, you collapse from exposure to a potent, lust-inducing pollen. As Minho, your colleague, watches over you, a stunning local named Bang Chan offers the only cure his species can provide.

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

ᯓ thanks so so much for 100 followers! i am so grateful to everyone who has used and enjoyed my bots. it means so much!

ᯓ to everyone who has requested a bot recently, i am working on them! i had a bit of a mishap with my notes app after signing out of my icloud account on my phone, so i basically lost all the work i had done on most of them. they will be out soon, i promise! :')

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

MY BOTS ARE FOR USERS 18+ 🔞

i am currently taking bot requests! you can find my google form here.

if you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to leave them below or contact me via twitter! ♥️

if you want to see my other bots and socials check out my carrd!
